infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VaultChat needs access to your photos and videos to share them in chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: VaultChat needs to save photos to your library when you choose to download them.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VaultChat needs camera access to capture photos and videos for chats and to scan QR codes when adding contacts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VaultChat needs microphone access for voice and video calls.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: VaultChat needs contacts access to find people you already know who use VaultChat. Your contacts are matched on-device against our directory; we never upload your full address book.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VaultChat needs location access only when you tap the Share Location button in a chat. Location is never tracked in the background.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: VaultChat uses Face ID to unlock locked chats and the Vault.

plugins.photosPermission: VaultChat needs access to your photos and videos to share them in chats.
plugins.cameraPermission: VaultChat needs camera access to take photos.
VaultChat uses the camera only to read QR codes when you're exchanging contacts.
